programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The complex logistics behind creating feasts for huge crowds; dining aboard a U.S. Navy sub packed with enough food for a 120-day mission; cooks prepare a "Victory Meal" for 1,000 Marines; feeding 69,000 NFL fans during a Philadelphia Eagles game.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Mega stores are giant facilities engineered to keep up with America's supersized habits; they are the largest, busiest places in the country; their greatest challenge: keeping up with demand on a massive scale.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The story of tuna, the most popular fish in the American diet; fishing and canning operations; a single tuna can net as much as $100,000 in the world's largest fish market in Tokyo; efforts to save the giant bluefin tuna tuna from overfishing.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: From the early "egg beaters" of World War II to the "flying tanks" of Operation Desert Storm, meet the first pilot to fly a combat rescue mission in WWII and a U.S.A.F. female aviator; and view classified footage of the Apache in Iraq.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Chrome hot rod; the Chrome Shop Mafia adds bling to truckers' big rigs in Missouri; Illinois' Arlington Plating Co. adds luster to auto parts; how Harley-Davidson puts chrome to work as both a decorative and protective feature of motorcycles.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Tiny weapons may not sound impressive, but small can kill, and it can also be easily concealed; from a pocket pistol used by the police to a submachine gun wielded by a bodyguard, many of today's most effective weapons are smaller than ever.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: A look under the feet of Americans, from secret military installations and experimental farms to tunnel networks and neutron lasers.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.desc: Susie va al hospital para que le quiten sus amígdalas y, mientras está bajo el efecto de la anestesia, sueña que ha entrado en una tierra extraña y mágica donde solo quiere volver a casa.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Después de que el abuelo les explica a los bebés lo que significa el día de San Valentín y Angélica le dispara a Firulais con flechas de Cupido, los bebés deciden que deben encontrarle una novia a Firulais y que esa será Fluffy.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato están en la Convención de Fanáticos de Mean Bob, mirando una lucha de WWF entre Mean Bob y su enemigo Evil Eric. / Tito sale a caminar, y Gato y Perro aprovechan para entrar a su casa.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Este es el cuento de un viejo pescador sobre el pez espada que cuelga de la pared del living de Perro y Gato. / Gato sufre una crisis de identidad cuando una banda de gatos bohemios abre una tienda cerca de la casa de Perro y Gato.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Desde que era un cachorro, Perro siempre persiguió al camión de la basura, conocido como el viejo 159. / Perro tiene que ponerse un cono sobre su cabeza para protegerse de las picaduras de garrapatas en la oreja.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: La rivalidad entre hermanos se descontrola cuando Papá y Mamá vienen a visitar a Perro y Gato. / Perro realmente tiene un problema cuando descubre que su fuente de alimentación preferida proviene de animales.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato audiciona para la producción musical de Abe Lincoln: superestrella, pero es abatido cuando Perro obtiene el papel principal y él tiene que ser el burro. /Perro descubre que otro canino violó su toma de agua preferida.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro está abatido al saber que sus huesos de leche preferidos están prohibidos en Nearburg, mientras que Gato tiene una idea para ganar dinero. / Perro come demasiados pasteles de nuez y comienza a crecerle un árbol de nuez en la cabeza.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato tienen la misión de encontrar a la Ardilla que arruinó los vegetales de Gato y robó los huesos de Perro. / Perro vuelve a sus viejos trucos, esta vez, persiguiendo a un avión que está aterrizando en el Aeropuerto.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato saca un libro viejo de los gatos en la historia, para enseñarle a Perro sobre la realeza felina en Egipto. / Tito encuentra a Gato en el acto de querer leer el diario de Perro y lo chantajea, convirtiéndolo así en su esclavo personal.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Princess Mansherry's amazing power - to heal living beings completely - is in the hands of the Donquixote executive. If she is able to heal all the executives who've gone down in battle - the Straw Hats and their allies stand no chance!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Señor Pink and Franky continue their knock-down, drag-out, manly fight. As both of them are pushed to their limits, we learn Señor's tragic past! Meanwhile, Princess Mansherry's rescue hits a snag as she stubbornly refuses to leave!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Franky and Señor Pink end their harrowing duel in a manly way - but victory knocks the wind out of even the winner's sails! Meanwhile, Diamante and Kyros struggle desperately on the Sunflower Field, each demonstrating their extreme prowess.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kyros, unbowed by Diamante's vicious attacks, fights back with the anger and retribution of all of Dressrosa in order to fulfill his promise to protect Rebecca. If he is successful, only a few executives will remain.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Pica loses his temper and turns his full wrath against King Riku, whom he hopes to destroy, ending the revolution against Doflamingo. Meanwhile, Zoro, who has been distracted by Pica and drawn far from the battle, has to hatch a plan to save the king!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the lives of King Riku, Usopp, and the others on the old King's Plateau in the balance, Zoro must dig deep and discover a powerful technique to counter Pica's near-unstoppable onslaught. Meanwhile, King Riku ponders what it means to be a good king.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro finishes off Pica, and those below his crumbling body rush to find shelter. Meanwhile, the Tontattas finish up demolishing the SMILE Factory, and Luffy's hand is forced in his duel with Bellamy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Taking down Bellamy only enrages Luffy in his fight against Doflamingo, his anger multiplying when he finds Law's lifeless body! Meanwhile, Doflamingo takes the next step to end the game he started, which will endanger everybody in Dressrosa!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Birdcage draws tighter and tighter around Dressrosa, threatening to destroy all life on the island kingdom! Meanwhile, Doflamingo stands down Luffy for a final confrontation, but a surprising twist shocks everyone on the top of the Royal Palace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law's attack proves powerful - but Doflamingo's power has depths which he and Luffy haven't bargained for. When Doflamingo makes his counterattack, Luffy stares him down with an amazing power.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Trebol's wrath is fully inflamed as Law summons enough energy to speak, denouncing the Doflamingo Family executives as pawns in Doflamingo's game. But Law gathers enough energy to do more than just speak out.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Cavendish has to make a difficult decision when the severely wounded Law begs him to be left behind. Meanwhile, seeing even his Second Gear or Third Gear attacks aren't working against Doflamingo, Luffy decides to use his ultimate technique!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Doflamingo duke it out while the Birdcage tightens its grip on Dressrosa! Zoro sets off with a plan to stop it from slicing apart the country, while Luffy's Fourth Gear proves quite potent against Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Birdcage continues its merciless constriction, sending the residents of Dressrosa fleeing towards the center of the island, while King Riku calls out to his people: Survive long enough for Luffy to vanquish the last of the royal family.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fourth Gear gives Luffy the power he needs to head off Doflamingo at every strike! But the energy required to keep Fourth Gear going starts to take a toll on Luffy. Will he have enough left to finish the job?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bounce-man's power has drained Luffy, leaving him in need of a rest before he can reuse his Haki, but luckily the gladiators from the Colosseum have come around and are focusing on taking down Doflamingo! Sabo steps in at a crucial moment.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Luffy and so many of the Straw Hats' allies incapacitated, victory seems inevitable for Doflamingo - but the compassion of Mansherry may be enough to turn the tide and renew their hope - to stop the Birdcage!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With just over a minute to spare, everyone in Dressrosa turns their efforts towards slowing down the Birdcage as it squeezes the life out of the country! Meanwhile, Viola seeks Doflamingo out herself, for a shocking confrontation!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Only a bit more time remains before Luffy returns to the scene! But as time slips by, those who had been roused by Princess Mansherry's powers begin to falter! Meanwhile, Rebecca, under the control of Doflamingo, is about to attack Viola!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy regains enough Haki to face off against Doflamingo, but his health is still poor. With the Birdcage closing in, is there a technique left in his repertoire that is strong enough to take down Doflamingo?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Doflamingo thoroughly quashed and the Birdcage collapsing, the people of Dressrosa shed tears of joy remembering the hardships they've endured, and the actions taken by Luffy and the others to free them.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Jesus Burgess of the Blackbeard Pirates tries to agitate Sabo, mocking Ace's final words in order to unsettle him enough that he can try to steal the Flare-Flare Fruit! Meanwhile, people of Dressrosa beg King Riku to resume the crown.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Repercussions of Doflamingo's defeat reverberate around the world! Fujitora's actions put the Navy in a tight spot, and the "Worst Generation" beings to stir into action!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The combatants in the battle for Dressrosa can finally begin to recoup, but those who stay awake are treated to the story of how Sabo joined the Revolutionary Army!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sabo recounts his surprising reunion with Luffy at the Colosseum as the Straw Hats and the others continue to recoup. Meanwhile, Fujitora gambles on how to make his next move - and the odds are in Luffy's favor!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Sabo departs, our attention shifts to the other Straw Hats waging a fierce battle on a mysterious island. And a new drama is set into motion as ill portents fall from the sky!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Luffy and the others begin to come to their senses, major players in the Navy arrive to search Dressrosa for the Straw Hats! Also, Rebecca's history is whitewashed with a fake cover story - but why?

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a devoted husband and father is found shot to death on his bathroom floor, the case is quickly ruled a homicide; a key witness starts changing their story, detectives must determine if this was an act of self-defense or premeditated murder.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A Wild West reenactor is found dead in his private Arizona ranch; police race to find the killer of the beloved showman; as investigators connect the dots, they realize the cold-blooded mastermind is lurking close to home.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When the spouse of a high-profile defense attorney is found dead in their Arkansas home, police theorize if a disgruntled client could be to blame; the investigation exposes an obsessive admirer with a delusional motive to murder.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After a routine welfare check, Albuquerque police discover a beloved teacher has vanished; as investigators dive into her family history, they uncover a shocking murder plot driven by vengeance and jealousy.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After an Oregon wife's failed suicide attempt results in her husband's death, the cracks in a seemingly perfect marriage are brought to light; the investigation uncovers if his inadvertent death is truly an accident or a deadly cover-up.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A Georgia woman who is brutally stabbed provides police with a suspect's name before succumbing to her injuries; as the manhunt for the killer begins, a pattern of toxicity exposes a violent past and more than one murder.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: The tragic suicide of a grandfather seems to be an open-and-shut case until detectives in Morrisdale, Pa., receive a message from beyond the grave that suggests the deceased may not have died by his own hand.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a former Penn State professor mysteriously goes missing, police uncover clues to his untimely demise; the investigation leads to a grisly crime scene and two unlikely culprits, who would stop at nothing to get rid of him.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A young woman seeks refuge at the home of a Wisconsin farmer, claiming she just escaped from a violent assault; when investigators arrive at the crime scene, they make a discovery that leads them to expose a deadly love triangle.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A loving father and veteran suddenly vanishes in coastal South Carolina; investigators question those close to him and find the unraveling threads of a love triangle; when his body surfaces in a nearby river, a crime of passion comes to light.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A family of rodeo queens is thrown into turmoil when their patriarch disappears from his Dalhart, Texas ranch; investigators search for the missing father, they expose family secrets that may lead to a murder plot.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: The sister of a successful Hollywood producer is found dead in the garage of a home they share; with conflicting clues at the scene, authorities are left to determineif the cause of death is a tragic accident, suicide or a malicious plan.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When an elderly woman finds her husband murdered in bed, police race to find the cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: After an avid outdoorsman dies from an apparent suicide, South Carolina investigators must unravel a murky story of mental health struggles and a complicated marriage that led to his death.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A grandmother is reported missing in Virginia weeks before her burned body is found in another state's woods; police navigate family tensions to uncover the truth behind her murder.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a beloved grandfather is found shot dead in his Florida home, detectives fear his missing ex-wife is also in danger; as they uncover a tangled web of romance, infidelity and betrayal, new questions arise about her involvement in the murder.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A father of four vanishes days before Christmas; what authorities believe to be a bond violation, unfolds into something evil.

programme.desc: The sun bathes our planet in warmth and light. It powers the machinery of nature, our weather, and it encourages and sustains life on land and at sea. We study it closely, and it can reveal the secrets of all other stars.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Orbit

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: First Light
programme.desc: The Hubble Telescope is nearing its end, the replacements are ready to go, ready to peer further back in time and space than can be imagined.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Space is vast, yet it is full of collisions. Gas and dust electrostatically flock together, and gravity takes over coalescing grains into rocks. Those rocks become boulders, then asteroids colliding again and again, striking planets and each other.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Living Planet
programme.desc: We have been observing Earth for 40 years now, in the last 20 we have focus with intensity on the planet with new technologies and capabilities, we have accumulated a mass of data that is now revealing a complex and ever changing living planet.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Sun
programme.desc: The sun bathes our planet in warmth and light. It powers the machinery of nature, our weather, and it encourages and sustains life on land and at sea. We study it closely, and it can reveal the secrets of all other stars.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Exo Planets
programme.desc: As scientists and astronomers peer more closely and with evermore fidelity at nearby stars, they are discovering countless exo planets. How many Earth-like planets are out there? Could one of them hold life not so different from our own?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Night Fire
programme.desc: The Northern Lights are more than just beautiful; they tell us about the make up of our planet, our sun, and may even be a signpost for the possibility of life on other planets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise
programme.desc: The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: Discover the most powerful telescopes on the planet as they search for the mysteries of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it’s also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: They key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On a distant planet the Stargate has become a symbol to the people, and some believe that the gods will return through it to reward the faithful. SG-1 realizes that those gods are the Goa'uld and warn of the danger they may face.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The team agrees that an easy VR simulator is a useless training tool against the Goa'uld. Teal'c lets it learn from him, but as he plays, the game sends a shock each time he dies, and if he doesn't defeat the game, the chair will kill him.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time, THE AMAZING RACE features 11 new teams of all dating duos: six who are preexisting couples, and five duos who meet for the first time at the starting line.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Nagano, Japan where Racers take on an Olympic-sized Detour, and one team takes a tumble that may jeopardize their chances in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Tensions rise in Thailand as one team forgets their fanny pack, putting them behind, and one Racer celebrates the end of the leg when they pop a very special question.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams face a race within the Race when they attempt to navigate the chaotic streets of Bangkok, and Racers eat a traditional delicacy - a "1,000 year old egg."

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers strap on lederhosen for a trip to Oktoberfest in Bavaria, Germany, and one team finds their race in jeopardy after losing their fanny pack.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time, the Race travels to Monaco, where one team takes a big risk to gain an edge on the competition.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: When the race continues in Namibia, a flat tire deflates one team's hopes of leading the pack and the dreaded Double U-Turn returns.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The competition heats up as the final five teams race to Amsterdam and take a dip in a floating hot tub in search of their next clue.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams travel to Peru, where the Race gets physical and teams use their fitness trackers to help find their next clue. Also, Blair and Hayley's communication issues reach a boiling point.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the penultimate leg, the final four teams race through Peru for a spot in the finale and a chance at the $1 million prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Everything is bigger in Texas, including THE AMAZING RACE season finale! With the $1 million dollar prize on the line, the final four teams race from Peru to Dallas, where they go to great heights at the top of AT&T Stadium.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven new teams take off on the journey of a lifetime from Venice Beach, Calif. and head for Rio de Janeiro, where teams take a thrilling helicopter ride and face a huge decision at the Fast Forward.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to the birthplace of Pope Francis, where they visit the church where he was baptized. Also, Racers are driven up a wall when they learn a tango with a twist.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker – the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. They're the most dangerous creatures in the world: smart assassins. And they usually don't stop at one kill.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Youths
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrives.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead, murdered for a stash of buried silver. A young woman dates violent men, only to be killed by her best friend.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The show examines cases of poison and deadly chemistry and shows how forensic experts are solving mysterious deaths today and from the past.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: 911 receives a desperate call in Fort Worth, Texas. A man's wife is shot. Forensic investigators search for clues in unlikely places, hoping the victim herself could provide information needed to determine how and why she died.

programme.title: Vasiliy Lomachenko vs Richard Commey
programme.desc: On December 11th, 2021 Vasiliy Lomachenko faced Richard Commey for the vacant WBO Inter-continental lightweight title at Madision Square Garden in New York with Commey going down in round 7 the bout ended in a unanimous decision victory for Loma.

programme.title: Vasiliy Lomachenko vs Roman Martinez
programme.desc: On June 11th, 2016 Vasiliy Lomachenko battled Roman Martinez for the WBO World Super Featherweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York with Martinez going down and counted out in round 5 out of 12 resulting in a knockout victory for Loma.

programme.title: Vince Phillips vs Kostya Tszyu
programme.desc: On May 31st, 1997, Vince Phillips fought Kostya Tszyu for the IBF Junior Welterweight Title in Atlantic City. In an incredible back-and-forth battle, Phillips pulled off a shocking and emotional upset over Tszyu with an impressive 10th round TKO win.

programme.title: Vinny Pazienza vs Roberto Duran 1
programme.desc: On June 25th, 1994 Vinny Pazienza faced Roberto Duran for the first time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a 12 round bout Pazienza went down in round 5 and Duran won this fight by unanimous decsion.

programme.title: Vinny Pazienza vs Roberto Duran 2
programme.desc: On January 14th, 1995 Vinny Pazienza fought Roberto Duran for a second time at the Convention Hall in Atlantic City in a 12 round bout resulting in a win for Pazienza.

programme.title: Aaron Pryor vs Alexis Arguello
programme.desc: On November 12th, 1982, Aaron Pryor fought Alexis Arguello for the WBA World Light Welterweight Title at the Orange Bowl in Miami. Despite Arguello being the favorite, Pryor stopped Arguello in the 14th round in The Ring's Fight of the Decade.

programme.title: Alex Saucedo vs Abner Lopez
programme.desc: On March 10th, 2018 Alex Saucedo faced Abner Lopez for the WBO and NABO Super lightweight title at the StubHub Center in Carson.

programme.title: Alex Saucedo vs Lenny Zappavigna
programme.desc: On June 30th, 2018 Alex Saucedo fought Lenny Zappavigna for the vacant WBO International Super lightweight title.

programme.title: Alexis Arguello vs Alfredo Escalera
programme.desc: On January 28th, 1978 Alexis Arguello fought Alfredo Escalera for the WBC World super featherweight title that ended in the 13th round.

programme.title: Alexis Arguello vs Ray Mancini
programme.desc: On October 3rd, 1981, Alexis Arguello fought Ray Mancini for the WBC Lightweight Championship in Atlantic City, in a very close and exciting fight.

programme.title: Antonio Margarito vs Miguel Cotto 1
programme.desc: On July 26th, 2008, Antonio Margarito fought Miguel Cotto for the WBA World Welterweight Title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas, in a very close and entertaining fight.

programme.title: Artur Beterbiev vs Joe Smith Jr.
programme.desc: On June 18th, 2022 Artur Beterbiev and Joe Smith Jr faced eachother in a battle for IBF, WBC and WBO World Light Heavyweight title at Madison Square Garden that ended by technical knockout in the second round securing the win for Beterbiev.

programme.title: Artur Beterbiev vs Oleksandr Gvozdyk
programme.desc: On October 18th, 2019, Artur Beterbiev fought Oleksandr Gvozdyk for the WBC and IBF Light Heavyweight Titles at Liacouras Center in Philadelphia. Beterbiev put on the pressure late, scoring three knockdowns in the 10th round in a TKO victory.

programme.title: Bernard Hopkins vs Kelly Pavlik
programme.desc: On October 18th, 2008 Bernard Hopkins fought Kelly Pavlik at the Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City ending in a unanimous decision victory for Hopkins.

programme.title: Bernard Hopkins vs Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: On September 18th, 2004, Bernard Hopkins fought Oscar De La Hoya for the undisputed world middleweight title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. After a quiet first eight rounds, Hopkins finished De La Hoya with a brutal body shot in the ninth round.

programme.title: Brandon Rios vs Miguel Acosta
programme.desc: On February 26th, 2011, Brandon Rios fought Miguel Acosta for the WBA World Lightweight Title at the Palms in Las Vegas. In a great back-and-forth fight, Brandon Rios knocked down Acosta hard, stopping him in the 10th round.

programme.desc: As a hate plague rapidly spreads among robots and humans on Earth, a fallen leader must rise and reclaim the Matrix of Leadership from an infected Rodimus Prime in order to save the galaxy, Transformers, and all mankind.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: While protecting an Earth military plant from a Decepticon attack, Optimus Prime is severely wounded. His only hope for survival is a new Cosmotron unit. The good news is that Wheeljack's got one—the bad news is that it's in his lab back on Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.desc: The Decepticons begin to siphon the Earth's heat from the Arctic Circle and temperatures worldwide begin to drop. But unknown to the Decepticons is what, or who, they are about to release from the ice.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
